title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Financial Analyst in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd:
IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd!
